name: mind-magic
description: James R. Doty's neuroscience-backed 6-step manifestation system — turn intention into reality by rewiring your brain's networks.
useCase: Master the neuroscience of manifestation: calm your nervous system, clarify your intentions, remove mental obstacles, embed goals in your subconscious, and release attachment to outcomes — all grounded in the latest brain science.
knownRisks: Manifestation is not a substitute for medical or mental health treatment — users with serious anxiety, depression, or trauma should seek professional help alongside these practices.
The techniques require consistent daily practice over weeks or months — users expecting instant results may feel discouraged.
Cultural and systemic barriers (poverty, discrimination, disability) can limit what manifestation alone can achieve — reality always has the final say.
